# Agent Evaluation Benchmarks

## Internal benchmarks

Create benchmark cases for:

```text
low traffic, high uncertainty
high CTR, no conversion
good signup, no activation
high CAC, good LTV
fatigued creative
conflicting platform metrics
bad attribution
competitor comparison opportunity
```

## Expected output

Each benchmark should have:

```text
correct_diagnosis
acceptable_models
bad_models
expected_next_action
scoring_rubric
```

## Passing

Agent must pick the right failure diagnosis before generating fixes.
